'''Yavin 22''' was an uninhabitable [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]], originally an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] captured by the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]. The wreck of the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Yavin Station]] could be found there. [[Suz Tanwa]] found Yavin Station where [[Gender/Legends|her]] ancestor, [[Suvam Tan]], worked and lived there. The climate was dry and cold with gravity at a standard of 0.15. There was no government, nor any major exports or imports.

{{Moon-stub}}
